visual_identity: high-contrast rock anime noir within dark anime with crimson red dominance
song_motif: a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression

color_palette.rule: limited-color anime palette: crimson red dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, subtle secondary reflections, silver-white rim highlights

core_locations: window-lit room above a quiet street
empty night highway with neon overhead signs
recurring_symbols: a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression
scratched guitar pick glowing cyber pink
lighting_language: strobing but controlled cyber-pink accents on beat peaks, distorted light streaks, harder contrast, impact flashes on drum accents, deep plum shadows, graphite darkness, silver-white rim highlights
transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression, neon reflections, and distorted light streaks, harder contrast, impact flashes on drum accents
